title: RHONairobi Episode 7: Sonal Mental Health, Minne Attacks Sonal And Vera For Gossip.
description:
After successful editions in Durban, Johannesburg, Cape Town, Lagos, and Abuja, the popular reality franchise The Real Housewives is finally coming to East Africa. The streaming service Showmax will air The Real Housewives of Nairobi on February 23, marking a potentially lucrative move for the platform as it expands the show's reach to different African countries and sets the stage for future seasons.

Fans of the show can expect to be entertained by the drama-filled lives of five Kenyan women drawn from media, entertainment, and entrepreneurship. As they orchestrate their own dynamic, they will follow the through-line and cues that have made the show such an obsessive watch.

Prduced by D&R Studios, this East African iteration is part of The Real Housewives franchise licensed as a format by NBCUniversal Formats. Get ready to be captivated by the cast members who are sure to hold our attention for weeks to come.
